name: Suspicious PowerShell Invocation Based on Parent Process
description: Detects PowerShell invocations from interpreters or unusual parent processes like wscript or the IIS worker process (`w3wp.exe`). This is a strong indicator of an adversary attempting to execute code and evade security defenses by using a seemingly legitimate parent process.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious **PowerShell** invocation was detected. The process **`powershell.exe`** was launched by an unusual parent process, **{parent_image}**. This is a strong indicator of **Execution** and **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1059.001**), where an adversary is attempting to hide malicious activity within a legitimate-looking process. The command line was **{command}**, and the event occurred under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched PowerShell.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the PowerShell process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
